channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Music Industry Experts Discuss How AI Might Influence Music Production and Creativity
item.description: In a recent discussion, industry experts have shared insights on the potential effects of artificial intelligence (AI) on the Philippine music scene. While AI technologies are becoming increasingly so...

item.title: NYSC Member Abba Musa Freed After Months in Captivity by Bandits
item.description: Abba Musa, wey be National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) member, don finally regain him freedom afta wey bandits hold am captive for months. E release happen on Wednesday afta plenty negotiation and pres...

item.title: Switzerland Considers Cancelling US Patriot Missile System Purchase Amid Delays
item.description: The Swiss government is seriously considering cancelling its deal to buy the US Patriot air-defence system due to ongoing delays in delivery. Defence Minister Martin Pfister confirmed that cancellatio...

item.title: Winnipeg Jets mount impressive turnaround to sit one point out of NHL playoff spot
item.description: The Winnipeg Jets have staged a remarkable recovery in the NHL regular season following the Olympic break. Prior to the pause, the team found itself struggling, sitting seven games below .500 and faci...

item.title: Palestinians in West Bank stage strike in protest of Israeli death penalty legislation
item.description: On Wednesday, Palestinians across the occupied West Bank held a general strike to protest a newly passed Israeli law that allows the death penalty for Palestinians convicted of deadly terror attacks. ...

item.title: Albanese unveils interest-free loans to support businesses impacted by fuel price surge
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese is set to introduce interest-free loans for businesses struggling under the current fuel crisis. The support, aimed at truck operators, freight companies, and fuel and ...

item.title: Arusha Stadium cost rises to meet international football standards
item.description: Di Government spokesperson Gerson Msigwa explain say di original budget for Arusha Stadium wey was planned in 2021, before Tanzania secure CAF approval to host Afcon matches, was Sh187 billion. But no...

item.title: Kia Introduces the EV3, Expanding Its Affordable Electric Vehicle Range
item.description: Kia has introduced the EV3, a subcompact SUV, as part of its strategy to offer more affordable electric vehicles to Canadians. Revealed at the New York International Auto Show, the EV3 slots below the...

item.title: Kenya pays CAF Sh3.9 billion as part of AFCON 2027 preparations
item.description: Public Service Principal Secretary Elijah Mwangi has confirmed that the Government of Kenya has already paid KSh 3.9 billion to the Confederation of African Football (CAF) as part of the preparations ...

item.title: Live Coverage of Chrism Mass at Manila Cathedral on Maundy Thursday 2026
item.description: The Maundy Thursday observance on April 2, 2026, in Manila will commence with the annual Chrism Mass at the historic Manila Cathedral. This significant liturgical event involves the blessing of holy o...

item.title: President Marcos Jr. was not arrested during US visit, Rappler fact-check confirms
item.description: A viral video claimed that President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. was arrested in the United States by order of former President Donald Trump. Rappler fact-checked the claim and found it to be false. The vide...

item.title: BBC clarifies its awareness and actions over past police investigation into DJ Scott Mills
item.description: The BBC has confirmed that it was made aware of a police investigation into DJ Scott Mills back in 2017 but stated it only decided to end his contract after receiving new information in recent weeks. ...

item.title: CBN Announces Successful End of Banking Recapitalisation Programme with N4.65 Trillion Raised by 33 Banks
item.description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) don finally conclude the banking sector recapitalisation programme wey dem start for March 2024. According to the statement wey dem release on Wednesday for Abuja, 33...

item.title: Alberta RCMP continue search for remains of missing infant after mother’s death
item.description: Alberta RCMP continue their investigation into the tragic death of 23-year-old Ayla Egotik-Learn and the presumed death of her infant daughter, Braylee Beasley. Egotik-Learn, an Inuk mother from Cambr...

item.title: Maruti Suzuki plans price hike amid rising input costs from Iran conflict
item.description: India’s leading automobile manufacturer, Maruti Suzuki, announced on April 1, 2026, that it may soon increase vehicle prices as a result of escalating commodity costs driven by the Iran conflict. The ...

item.title: Concerns arise over potential influence of online betting on Alberta separatism referendum
item.description: Albertans now have the option to use offshore gambling platforms such as Kalshi and Polymarket to place bets on the likelihood of the province separating from Canada. Experts are raising concerns that...

item.title: Trump to give update on Iran conflict amid domestic and international diplomatic moves
item.description: US President Donald Trump is scheduled to address the American public at 9pm EST on Wednesday, which will be 6am Thursday in Pakistan, regarding the ongoing Iran conflict. According to the White House...

item.title: Yellow House Emerges Champions at Dinada Academy Annual Inter-House Sports
item.description: For the first annual inter-house sports competition at Dinada Academy Nursery and Primary School, Yellow House show serious skill as dem finish top with 182 points. The event, wey hold for Old Port Ha...

item.title: Community and Artists Celebrate the Life of Aunty Rhoda Roberts AO
item.description: Aunty Rhoda Roberts AO, a revered elder, cultural leader, and advocate for Indigenous arts, was commemorated in a heartfelt funeral service in Lismore, her childhood home on Bundjalung Country. The se...

item.title: Yira Sor Grateful For His First Super Eagles Call-Up
item.description: Yira Sor, wey don play before for Nigeria under-17 team, don express plenty joy as he collect him first invitation to join the Super Eagles, Nigeria senior football squad. The young baller, wey dey pl...
